text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka, Suzuka! Wanna eat dinner together
tonight?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You see, my mom sent me a ton of carrots for my
birthday!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
They'll be arriving later, so if you want, maybe we
can throw a carrot par—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, Spe. I have a prior engagement
tonight...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm really sorry. To be frank, I've already
promised to celebrate my friend Spe's birthday
tonight.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...I-is that right? Well, no worries. You can't miss
Spe's birthday, after all...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, we shouldn't keep everyone waiting. Let's
go, Spe.
